aer.name: Azimuth Elevation Range
aer.description: Generate azimuth, elevation, and range data for satellite passes

lla.name: Latitude Longitude Altitude
lla.description: Generate latitude, longitude, and altitude data over time

eci.name: Earth Centered Inertial
eci.description: Generate ECI position and velocity vectors over time

coes.name: Classical Orbital Elements
coes.description: Generate classical orbital elements at current epoch

visibilityWindows.name: Visibility Windows
visibilityWindows.description: Generate visibility windows with rise/set times and pass duration

sunEclipse.name: Sun/Eclipse Analysis
sunEclipse.description: Generate sun visibility and eclipse entry/exit times for power and thermal analysis

help.overview: The Reports menu generates text reports about the selected satellite: pass geometry, position over time, orbital elements, visibility windows, and eclipse analysis. Each report opens in its own window, neatly formatted with a download button, ready to paste into other tools or share.
help.imgAlt: The Reports menu listing the available report types
help.imgCaption: Each button generates a formatted text report for the selected satellite.
help.types:
• Azimuth Elevation Range: look angles from the selected sensor through upcoming passes (needs a sensor).
  • Latitude Longitude Altitude: the ground track over time.
  • Earth Centered Inertial: ECI position and velocity vectors over time.
  • Classical Orbital Elements: the Keplerian elements at the current epoch.
  • Visibility Windows: rise and set times with pass durations (needs a sensor).
  • Sun/Eclipse Analysis: sunlight and eclipse entry and exit times, useful for power and thermal work.
help.howToUse:
1. Select a satellite; the bottom icon is disabled until one is selected.
  2. For sensor based reports, select a sensor too.
  3. Open Reports from the bottom bar and click a report button. The report opens in a popup window.
  4. Use the download button in the report window to save it as a text file.
help.tip1: Reports cover several days of data; generation can take a few seconds for the pass based reports.
help.tip2: If the report window does not appear, your browser's popup blocker is the usual culprit; allow popups for this site.
